name: Macy's, Inc.
business: Macy's, Inc. is a premier omnichannel retail organization that operates 665 stores, websites and mobile applications under three iconic brands: Macy's, Bloomingdale's and Bluemercury. It sells a wide range of merchandise including apparel and accessories, cosmetics, home furnishings and other consumer goods. It caters to an annual customer base of nearly 40 million active consumers, targeting a broad middle-to-higher-income customer base as well as affluent luxury consumers.

exposures.sentence: We are applying artificial intelligence to how customers discover, shop and engage with our brands through intelligent shopping assistance, agentic commerce and hyper-personalized experience.
opened our new state-of-the-art fulfillment and store replenishment center, China Grove, which incorporates automation, robotics and artificial intelligence into our delivery ecosystem.

A breach of our information technology systems could adversely affect our reputation, business partner and customer relationships and operations and result in higher costs.
We use our digital platforms as sales channels for our products and services.
We maintain a portfolio of private label brands across all three nameplates that help differentiate assortment and support margin and value propositions.
We generate revenue beyond merchandise sales, including through our credit card program, a profit sharing portfolio that is an integral part of our broader retail ecosystem.

catalysts.sentence: On February 27, 2026, the Company's Board of Directors declared a regular quarterly dividend of 19.15 cents per share on its common stock, payable April 1, 2026, to shareholders of record at the close of business on March 13, 2026.
The Company expects capital expenditures to be approximately $800 million during 2026.
